data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies user decision-making by restricting menu options.
data.technical_spec: Minimum viable product with a simplified user interface.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Design aims to minimize the time taken for target selection by optimizing component placements.
data.technical_spec: Keep frequently used elements closer to the central focus areas.

data.title: Mobile Usability
data.description: Enhanced mobile experience with a responsive design.

data.title: Affordance and Signifiers
data.description: Clear visual cues for interactive elements.
data.technical_spec: Consistent button styling and hover effects.

data.title: Feedback and Response Time
data.description: Immediate feedback for user actions to keep users informed.
data.technical_spec: Loading spinners and success messages triggered via AJAX.
